text: Buy a beat up wii and play wii sports or just dance, equal amounts of fun
text_zh: 买个二手的 Wii 玩 Wii Sports 或 Just Dance，乐趣差不多

text: i love the nex playground bro
text_zh: 我爱这个 Nex 游乐场，哥

text: Hi Sydney! We’d love to work with you on our new Easter Basket~ Please check your collab invites from us 🐣💐
text_zh: 嗨 Sydney！我们很想和你合作推广我们的新款复活节篮子~ 请查看我们的合作邀请 🐣💐

text: this is the console that is out selling xbox and is almost out sell play station btw
text_zh: 这款游戏机销量已经超过Xbox，并且快要超过PlayStation了，顺便说一句

text: This looks like so much fun
Just buy a Wii and a copy of just dance bro
text_zh: 直接买个 Wii 和《Just Dance》就行了老兄

text: Omg she has a iPad and so does I 🥰🥰🥰🥰
Wait is it on YouTube so I can put this for my lil cousin
text_zh: 等等，YouTube上有吗？这样我就可以给我小表弟看了
[贴纸] 你出局了，你搬家了！

text: It always catches me off guard seeing the Nex playground
text_zh: 看到Nex游乐场总让我措手不及
直接买个 Wii 就得了 💔✌️

text: my fave games on the next box r bluey, jugglr, and wakamole
text_zh: 我在 Nex box 上最喜欢的游戏是 Bluey、Jugglr 和 Wakamole

text: Omg their gonna kind this the most nostalgic thing ever, I remember doing this on the Leap Frog amd having to pop all the little bubbles
text_zh: 我的天，他们会把这东西当成最怀旧的东西，我记得在 Leap Frog 上玩这个，还得一个一个把小泡泡戳破

text: I was playing this in a Walmart its like Hella fun lowkey
text_zh: 我在沃尔玛玩这个，感觉超级好玩，低调地说

text: Only thing that would keep me off my ipad
text_zh: 唯一能让我不玩 iPad 的东西

text: They have this at Walmart and I play it everytime I’m there
text_zh: 沃尔玛有这个，我每次去都玩

text: Nex playground is so much fun!
I cannot fathom spending this much money, you also need to buy a game pass for it too correct? If not I can see the allure but plz lmk if you have to get that pass everyone talks about or not
text_zh: 我无法想象花这么多钱买这个，而且还要买游戏通行证是吧？如果不用的话我倒是能理解，但是请告诉我一下，是不是得买大家说的那个通行证还是不用？

text: she was trying to follow the magnifier glass 😭
text_zh: 她一直在尝试跟着放大镜 😭

text: YALL should get it it’s really fun :)
text_zh: 你们快买吧，真的很好玩 :)

text: The children yearn for the Kinect

text_zh: 如 何 做 到 这个

text: I saw this at Walmart my little brother was playing with this
text_zh: 我在沃尔玛看到过这个，我弟弟一直在玩

text: I have one just not th same it’s called tv something
text_zh: 我有一个，但不是一样的，叫电视什么的

text: To anybody who buy this, it’s $100 a year
text_zh: 买这个的人注意了，一年要100美元

text: Hey so when can I come over for a playdate ☺️😂
text_zh: 嘿，那我什么时候能过来玩？☺️😂

text: I would push my kid out the way and play this myself 😭😭
text_zh: 我会推开我孩子自己来玩这个 😭😭

text: @gabriela when we were playing with this at best buy
text_zh: @gabriela 当我们在百思买玩这个的时候
